sglang.title: `model_rpc` style improvement
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
What does this PR do?

Make the old ModelRpcServer an independent class, with the __init__ function to initialize all the fields, which were initialized in exposed_init_model before.
Change the thread server
class ModelRpcService(rpyc.Service):
    exposed_ModelRpcServer = ModelRpcServer

vllm.title: [Misc] Bump transformers version
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Bump transformers version to >=4.39.1. This is necessary since 4.39.1 patched some breaking changes to LLaVA model that would block #3042.

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix Falcon tied embeddings
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Supersedes #3579
This PR fixes a bug that vLLM does not use tied embeddings for Falcon models. This bug didn't appear on Falcon-7B since the checkpoint has duplicated weights for word embeddings and LM head. However, the bug appeared for other Falcon models who don't duplicate the weights. The PR wa

vllm.title: [CI] typo fix: is_hip --> is_hip()
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix a typo in function call

vllm.title: [CI/Build] respect the common environment variable MAX_JOBS
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The default config crashes my devbox with g2-standard-24 VM. It is often the case in projects requiring compiling cuda kernels, such as xformers (related issue: facebookresearch/xformers#748 ).
This PR respects the commonly used environment variable MAX_JOBS, and add a note in the installation guide

vllm.title: [CI/Build] fix flaky test
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When the random batchsize is 1, 2, 3, 4, we will pad them into 1, 2, 4, 4, i.e. _get_graph_batch_size(original_size), instead of aligning them to be a multiple of 8.
That's why the test is flaky. The code is good, but the test is wrong.
Since these tests are quite cheep, I use pytest.mark.parametriz

vllm.title: [Core] Refactor Attention Take 2
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR is the second attempt to modularize the attention backends. The main goal of this PR is to hide any backend-specific attention implementation details from the main logic.
